actions.label: Drive the Harvest
actions.desc: Push the whole coven into the fields from dawn to dark. The granary fills; the spirit frays.

actions.label: Bless the Fields
actions.desc: Coax the crops with growth-runes and a little spent mana.

actions.label: Buy Seed-Grain
actions.desc: Send coin down the market roads for grain and good seed.

actions.label: Forage the Wastes
actions.desc: Send gatherers into the broken lands. There is food out there — and worse than food.
